prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 21 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 46.2 kg; Height 155.6 cm; BMI 19.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 8.5%), FPG (12 months ago 200mg/dL; 9 months ago 211mg/dL; 6 months ago 200mg/dL; 3 months ago 183mg/dL; current 215mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 48.7kg; 9 months ago 46.3kg; 6 months ago 43.3kg; 3 months ago 41.9kg; current 46.2kg), Height (12 months ago 155.6cm; 9 months ago 155.6cm; 6 months ago 155.6cm; 3 months ago 155.6cm; current 155.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 17.0kg/m²; current 19.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 81mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 28U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 26U/L), AST (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.3mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; current 50mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 130mg/g; 9 months ago 140mg/g; 6 months ago 145mg/g; 3 months ago 119mg/g; current 140mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 93mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 138mg/dL; 9 months ago 133mg/dL; 6 months ago 137mg/dL; 3 months ago 132mg/dL; current 126mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.51 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
